{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/145201104?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ttzero25", "id": 145201104, "login": "ttzero25", "node_id": "U_kgDOCKeX0A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ttzero25", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55828", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "### Impact

The go.qbee.io/transport library is affected by a symlink-chain path traversal vulnerability in its extractTar routine. The library's path validation is strictly lexical and fails to account for on-disk symlinks created earlier in the extraction process. Consequently, a crafted tar archive can be used to write or overwrite files one directory level above the intended extraction path. In the case of qbee-agent, which runs with root privileges, this vulnerability permits a root-privileged file write outside the intended destination.

### Patches

The issue has been addressed in version v1.26.25", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:31Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55828"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:31Z", "references": ["https://github.com/qbee-io/transport/security/advisories/GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/qbee-io/transport/security-advisories/GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/qbee-io/transport", "summary": "go.qbee.io/transport: Symlink-chain path traversal in tar extraction (one level outside destination)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:15:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f9m7-vc86-p6jj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.26.25", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.qbee.io/transport"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.26.25"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: go.qbee.io/transport: Symlink-chain path traversal in tar extraction (one level outside destination)
